description_long: This is a compact wooden wardrobe with a rectangular top and two vertically hinged doors on the front. The wood has a medium brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a classic and slightly rustic appearance. The doors feature arched panel detailing and are equipped with dark, vertically oriented bar handles. The sides and back are plain, with the same wood texture and finish as the front. The base of the wardrobe has a subtle decorative cutout, adding a touch of elegance to its otherwise simple design. This piece is suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or small apartments.
description: A small, brown wooden wardrobe with two paneled doors and dark bar handles, featuring a classic and slightly rustic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two arched panel doors with dark bar handles and a decorative base cutout.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain wooden panel with no visible handles or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain wooden panel and no visible features.
